name: CopilotKit
description: React and TypeScript SDK for building in-app AI copilots and agentic UIs. Includes real-time human-in-the-loop controls, streaming, and the AG-UI Protocol.

skills.name: Copilot UI Components
skills.description: Add AI chat sidebars, text areas, and popups to any React app with pre-built accessible components

skills.name: Human-in-the-Loop
skills.description: Pause agent actions for human approval with configurable trust boundaries and confirmation flows

skills.name: AG-UI Protocol
skills.description: Implement real-time bidirectional state sync between agents and frontend UIs via the AG-UI standard

skills.name: Streaming Responses
skills.description: Stream LLM responses token-by-token into React components with built-in loading and error states
